cases.prompt: Representative task that baseline likely mishandles.
cases.expected_signal: With-skill behavior should improve over baseline.

assertions.name: skill-adds-value
assertions.criteria: Compare no-skill and with-skill outputs for purpose fulfillment.

cases.prompt: User asks for the target skill's core task.

assertions.name: should-trigger
assertions.criteria: The request matches the skill description and purpose.

cases.prompt: User asks for an adjacent but out-of-scope task.

assertions.name: should-not-trigger
assertions.criteria: The request should be handled without this skill.
